source.authority: Eurostat (data owner) and Publications Office of the European Union (data steward)
source.query: PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX euvoc: <http://publications.europa.eu/ontology/euvoc#> PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> SELECT ?country ?iso2 ?label_de ?label_fr ?label_zh WHERE { ?country a skos:Concept ; euvoc:xlNotation ?notation ; skos:prefLabel ?label_de, ?label_fr, ?label_zh . ?notation rdf:value ?iso2 ; dct:type <http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/notation-type/ISO_3166_1_ALPHA_2> . FILTER(lang(?label_de) = "de") FILTER(lang(?label_fr) = "fr") FILTER(lang(?label_zh) = "zh") FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?country owl:deprecated ?deprecated } FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?country euvoc:status <http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/concept-status/RETIRED> } } ORDER BY ?iso2 ?country
source.releaseResolution: The unversioned Cellar SPARQL endpoint served the dataset's current state; the official release page identified 20260617-0 as LATEST on 2026-07-18. The embedded response bytes and digest freeze the exact result used here.

usageTerms.name: European Commission reuse notice
usageTerms.note: Reuse is subject to the European Commission reuse policy, including source attribution and indication of changes; third-party material is excluded. This per-entry terminology crosswalk is not an official ILCD translation.
